testcase.name: Qualified Dividends calculates appropriate tax withholding for single, mfj, and hoh filers

failure.message: UnsupportedOperationException was thrown during property evaluation. (QualifiedDividendsSpec.scala:120) Message: path '/tentativeTaxWithNetCapitalGains' was not found Occurred at table row 0 (zero based, not counting headings), which had values ( status = single, taxableIncome = 40000, qualDiv = 4000, ltCapitalGains = 1000, amtAt0 = 5000, totalAt15 = 0, totalAt20 = 0, totalTax = 0 )
